title: Enterprise document permissions are not consistently indexed
mitigation: Restrict the beta corpus to validated sources and complete permission test coverage with Security before expanding access.

title: Search relevance quality varies across technical domains
mitigation: Tune retrieval weights using the API Services evaluation set and publish weekly relevance scorecards.

title: API Services cutover exceeds planned maintenance window
mitigation: Split the cutover into two waves, retain dual-run capacity, and complete a rollback rehearsal before steering approval.

title: Dual-run cloud spend is trending above forecast
mitigation: Review workload exit dates weekly and request a time-boxed budget exception for the API Services cutover.

title: Two legacy integrations still bypass the unified identity service
mitigation: Complete adapter work with API Services and require migration plans before the pilot exit review.

title: Push notification delivery telemetry is incomplete on Android
mitigation: Instrument delivery funnel dashboards and verify alert thresholds during the external beta.

title: Production backfill may saturate shared compute capacity
mitigation: Reserve an isolated compute pool, add saturation alerts, and run a 25 percent scale rehearsal before the full test.

title: Finance dashboards have not completed data reconciliation
mitigation: Run parallel validation for five business days and resolve metric definition mismatches with Product Management.
